query: PostgreSQL ecosystem and tooling for real-time analytics
answer: PostgreSQL supports real-time analytics via extensions like TimescaleDB for time-series data and tools like Domo for reporting. Columnar storage is essential for fast query performance. TimescaleDB enhances PostgreSQL for real-time analytics.

results.snippet: Mixpanel – Offers real-time, no-SQL analytics and deep data exploration but can be costly and requires reverse ETL to connect with PostgreSQL.
